hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load(sys.stdin); path=data.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); sys.exit(1) if 'progress.json' in path else sys.exit(0)"
python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load(sys.stdin); path=data.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); sys.exit(0) if not path.endswith('.py') else sys.exit(1)" || uv run ruff check --fix .
